name: Great Ridge Academy DELUXE
description:
This is a remake of @Tymiar15’s bot Great Ridge Academy, except I added more stuff in general cause I feel like the original could’ve used more info, might even add more in the future.
If they want me to take down this bot, then I will oblige. (Please don’t I spent a lot of time on this)
Art and characters by BlackWhiplash.
